keys.meta_description: Requests, calendars, approvals, and policy-aware automation.
keys.features_0_description: Balances and dates with policy hints.
keys.features_2_description: Routes that match your org structure.
keys.sections_0_body: Email and spreadsheets break coverage and compliance.
keys.sections_1_body: Requests, balances, and calendars stay connected.
keys.sections_2_body: Safe cases auto-approve; conflicts get nudged.
keys.faq_0_q: Can leave policies differ by employee type or department?
keys.faq_0_a: Yes. Leave types, accrual rules, and approval chains can be configured per employee group, department, or employment contract.
keys.faq_1_q: How are team coverage conflicts handled?
keys.faq_1_a: The calendar view shows who is already approved off when a new request is submitted. Configurable rules can block, flag, or auto-escalate overlapping requests.
keys.faq_2_q: Is there an audit log of leave approvals?
keys.faq_2_a: Every request, approval, rejection, and cancellation is timestamped and stored. Managers and HR can review the full history for any employee.
keys.faq_3_q: Can we start small and expand?
keys.faq_3_a: Yes. Turn on modules as you grow—HR, finance, analytics, and workflow blocks scale together.
keys.faq_4_a: Use the Pricing page for tiers; Enterprise adds SLA, scale, and governance options.
keys.faq_5_q: How do I get a demo?
keys.faq_5_a: Use Talk to sales or Book demo from the header—our team can align Automation and Scheduler to your process.
keys.faq_6_a: Contact our team for a walkthrough tailored to your workflow.
keys.faq_7_a: Contact our team for a walkthrough tailored to your workflow.
